## 3. Step-1 工作流 : https://chenghyang2001.app.n8n.cloud/workflow/VDN9n1CLatj9riFw

parameters.query:
SELECT
    id,
    house_id,
    edge_id,
    type_id,
    mode,
    name,
    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(device_states, '$.zp.mode')) AS mode,
    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(device_states, '$.zp.fan_speed')) AS fan_speed
FROM rooms
WHERE edge_id = {{ $json.edge_id }}
ORDER BY id ASC;

parameters.content:
## ( Step 1 : Init at 11:55PM every night )
## 1. 董事長家 中控ID = 65, 建威廚房中控ID = 7
## 2. Update : 20251223

assignments.name: content
assignments.value: =董事長家-風速檢查-v2 Init Done

ORDER BY id ASC;
